acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects edges[] entries whose from_node or to_node does not match a node in roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The checker now validates both edge endpoint fields against the roadmap node id set; the unknown endpoint smoke log records the expected file-scoped rejection.
The self-edge validator compares normalized string endpoints; the self-edge smoke log records the expected rejection.
The duplicate validator groups edge records by from_node, to_node, and type and reports duplicate entries; the duplicate edge smoke log records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects unknown edges[].type values outside requires.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The existing roadmap value vocabulary helper now validates edges[].type against requires; the unknown type smoke log records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Current reports/export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-edge-schema-contract/qd-reports-check.log records just qd-reports-check passing with the stricter edge contract.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Required evidence logs and reports are present.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The evidence directory contains qd-reports-check.log, just-check.log, four temporary-copy negative smoke logs, and git-diff-check.log; report JSON files use the matching nodeId.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; Linux command evidence is recorded and no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
